variants.headline: Sustainable Kitchen Starts Here 🌿
variants.primary_text: Your plastic cutting boards are history. Upgrade to 100% organic bamboo that’s knife-safe, naturally antimicrobial & stunning on any counter. New customer? Enjoy 20% OFF today!
variants.angle: Eco-conscious sustainability - appeal to environmental values and the satisfaction of replacing plastic

variants.headline: Cook Smarter, Not Harder 🔫
variants.primary_text: Ditch worn-out plastic for premium bamboo that protects your knives AND your health. Our 3-piece set is knife-safe, easy to clean & built to last years. 20% OFF for first-timers!
variants.angle: Functionality & quality - focus on kitchen performance, knife protection and durability

variants.headline: The Last Cutting Board Set 🌟
variants.primary_text: Finally, cutting boards that work as good as they look. Organic bamboo, knife-safe surface & perfect for every meal prep. New here? Take 20% OFF your first order of our bestseller!
variants.angle: Value/transition - position as a one-time purchase that solves all cutting board problems
